prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 青海 大学为国家211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名近年约第180-200名，属于211院校中下游层次，近年排名略有下滑（2024年第173名→2025年第198名→2026年未进入前200 名）；该校声誉平稳，近年无明显正面或负面舆情事件；抖音热度一般，总排名第106位，综合热度较低，短视频平台关注度不高，未出现明显报考热度信号。 青海大学在第五轮学科评估中无A-及以上等级学科，优势学科主要集中在高原医学、草学、生态学等特色领域，整体学科竞争力在211院校中偏弱。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息、电气工程、临床医学等热门专业持续高热推荐，而青海大学相关专业录取位次较高；土木建筑、生化环材等专业明显劝退。山东省2026年高考报 名人数约72万人，较2025年增加约3.9万人（+5.7%），考生规模持续扩大，竞争进一步加剧。 青海大学位于青海省西宁市，属于西部偏远地区高校，对东部沿海省份山东考生而言地域吸引力较弱。该校在山东省招生规模较大（约290人），占其省外招生重 要比例，但地理位置因素对山东考生报考意愿有一定抑制作用。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划与2025年持平、山东省考生总数增长约5.7%导致竞 争加剧、学校排名略有下滑且声誉热度一般等因素，预计2026年青海大学在山东省综合类最低录取位次将继续后移。预测最低位次约114684名，区间114184-115184名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Qinghai University in Shandong Province's comprehensive category were approximately 69,370, 68,917, 93,123, 98,857, and 111,684 respectively. The overall trend shows a continuous backward shift, with 2021-2022 basically flat, a significant decline starting in 2023, and a cumulative backward shift of about 42,767 places over the past three years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 111,684. The university's enrollment plan in Shandong Province was 243 in 2021, 249 in 2022, 259 in 2023, 292 in 2024, and 290 in 2025, showing a gradual expansion trend; the 2026 comprehensive category plan is 242, medical category plan is 48, totaling 290, unchanged from 2025. The plan no longer expands, which has limited effect on alleviating competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Qinghai University is a national 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science China University ranking has been around 180-200 in recent years, placing it in the lower-middle tier of 211 universities, with a slight decline in recent years (173rd in 2024 → 198th in 2025 → not in the top 200 in 2026). The university's reputation is stable, with no significant positive or negative public opinion incidents in recent years; its Douyin popularity is average, ranking 106th overall, with low comprehensive popularity and low attention on short video platforms, showing no obvious signal of application heat. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Qinghai University has no A- or above disciplines. Its advantageous disciplines are mainly in characteristic fields such as plateau medicine, grass science, and ecology, with overall discipline competitiveness being relatively weak among 211 universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as computer science, electronic information, electrical engineering, and clinical medicine continue to be highly recommended, while related majors at Qinghai University have higher admission rankings; majors like civil engineering, biology, chemistry, environment, and materials are clearly discouraged. The number of candidates for the 2026 college entrance examination in Shandong Province is about 720,000, an increase of about 39,000 (+5.7%) compared to 2025, with the candidate scale continuing to expand and competition further intensifying. Qinghai University is located in Xining City, Qinghai Province, a remote western region university, which has weak regional appeal to Shandong candidates from the eastern coastal province. The university has a large enrollment scale in Shandong Province (about 290), accounting for an important proportion of its out-of-province enrollment, but the geographical factor has a certain inhibitory effect on Shandong candidates' willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward shift trend of historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025, the increase in the number of candidates in Shandong Province by about 5.7% leading to intensified competition, the slight decline in school ranking and average reputation and popularity, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Qinghai University in Shandong Province's comprehensive category in 2026 will continue to shift backward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 114,684, with a range of 114,184-115,184.

It is recommended that candidates within the predicted ranking range focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice and Tier 3 majors as a safety net; candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 110,000) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors (computer science, electrical engineering); candidates with rankings close to the upper limit of the range should mainly choose Tier 3 majors, being careful to avoid obviously discouraged majors such as civil engineering, environment, and materials.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Qinghai University's medical programs in Shandong Province have shown a continuous downward trend over the past five years: 2021: 71,619 → 2022: 71,458 (basically flat) → 2023: 75,995 (down by about 4,500) → 2024: 93,374 (down by about 17,000) → 2025: 134,596 (sharp drop of about 41,000). Enrollment plans have simultaneously expanded: 2021: 20 → 2022: 21 → 2023: 28 → 2024: 31 → 2025: 43. The 2026 plan continues to expand to 48 (an increase of 5 from 2025, about 11.6%), with a narrower expansion rate compared to the previous two years.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Qinghai University is a key national university under the 211 Project and has been selected as a Double First-Class university, located in Xining, Qinghai Province. As a comprehensive university in the northwest region, its medical school has a certain influence within the area, but due to factors such as remote geographical location and relatively limited high-quality medical resources, its appeal to candidates from eastern coastal provinces is relatively limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Medical programs nationwide continue to maintain high application popularity, with core programs like clinical medicine and stomatology being highly competitive. However, Qinghai University is located in the northwest, far from Shandong Province, leading to regional preference differences among candidates. Shandong Province has a large enrollment scale for medical programs, and provincial medical schools (such as Shandong University, Qingdao University, etc.) divert most high-scoring candidates. Qinghai University's medical programs have expanded enrollment for many consecutive years, from 20 in 2021 to 48 in 2026, a 140% increase, resulting in a clear dilution effect on student quality.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the supply-demand elasticity model with historical trends, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Qinghai University's medical programs in Shandong Province in 2026 will be approximately 143,187, continuing to decline by about 8,600 from 2025 (134,596), but the decline rate will significantly narrow compared to 2024→2025. The fluctuation range is expected to be between 142,700 and 143,674.
